description_long: This house features a steeply pitched blue shingle roof with a prominent central chimney and a stone foundation. The exterior walls are finished in a muted tan color, accented by wooden framing at the corners and around the windows. The windows are arched with a lattice pattern, providing a classic, cottage-like appearance. The main entryway is recessed under a small gabled extension, with a wooden door and a covered porch area. The roofline is complex, with multiple intersecting gables and a visible chimney stack. The overall design suggests a cozy, single-story residential dwelling with traditional architectural influences.
description: A single-story house with a blue shingle roof, stone foundation, arched lattice windows, and a central chimney, evoking a classic cottage style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway under a gabled porch, arched windows, and the central chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the blue shingle roof, and a single arched window.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the roof, stone foundation, and plain back wall with no visible entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gabled extension, side windows, and the chimney stack.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed wooden door under a small gabled porch with a covered entry and no visible steps
